data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings Increases Bitcoin Investment
data.description: According to Odaily, Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings has announced that its board has approved further investment in Bitcoin. On the 20th of this month, the company conducted a series of transactions on a cryptocurrency trading platform in the open market, acquiring approximately 7.88 units of Bitcoin. The total cost of these transactions was around 5.9369 million Hong Kong dollars, funded through the company's internal resources. Currently, Hong Kong Asia Holdings holds about 8.88 units of Bitcoin, with an average cost of 756,200 Hong Kong dollars per unit.

data.title: Georgia Introduces Second Bitcoin Reserve Bill Allowing State Investments
data.description: According to PANews, Georgia has introduced a second Bitcoin reserve bill, SB 228, which permits the state to invest in Bitcoin without any investment restrictions. Previously, Georgia proposed legislation allowing the state treasurer to invest in Bitcoin. The bill, as shown in screenshots provided by the media, involves state deposit institutions and outlines provisions for the state deposit board to authorize the state treasurer to invest in Bitcoin. It also sets limits on such investments, establishes requirements for the secure handling of these assets, and includes provisions for lending these assets. Additionally, it seeks to repeal any conflicting laws.

data.title: Safe Wallet Team Plans Gradual Service Restoration With Enhanced Security
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 24, Safe.eth announced on the X platform that the Safe Wallet team is actively working to restore services and will begin a phased rollout within the next 24 hours. The restored Safe Wallet will feature additional security measures, including extra verification for transaction hashes, data, and signatures, as well as enhanced monitoring alerts. The team has temporarily removed local Ledger integration, which was used in the targeted attack on Bybit.

Following the restoration, users may experience slightly longer transaction times or performance issues due to the additional checks in place. Users are advised to remain vigilant and verify the accuracy of transaction data when signing.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a net outflow of $559 million last week, and only VanEck Bitcoin ETF HODL achieved a weekly net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, last week's trading day (February 18 to February 21, Eastern Time), Bitcoin spot ETFs had a net outflow of 559 million US dollars last week.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest weekly net inflow last week was VanEck Bitcoin ETF HODL, with a weekly net inflow of 4.13 million US dollars. The current total net inflow of HODL has reached 871 million US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest weekly net outflow last week was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a weekly net outflow of 166 million US dollars. The current total net inflow of FBTC has reached 12.33 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 110.795 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 5.88%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 39.556 billion US dollars.

data.title: UXLINK launches a new round of ecological airdrops, 9 listed tokens are airdropped to $UXLINK stakers
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced on the official X platform that it will airdrop 9 tokens to eligible UXLINK stakers, namely: SOLV, SONIC, DUCK, MOZ, DYOR, XOXO, N3, OBT, and PINGO. These tokens are all from partners in the UXLINK ecosystem. UXLINK adopts a model similar to BNB and BGB, empowering its governance token UXLINK through its huge Web3 social ecosystem and continuously giving back to the community; and through the UXLINK Social Growth Layer, it brings high-quality and high-stickiness social user growth to Web3 project parties.
The head of the UXLINK community said that global community members welcome this, and are working with ecological partners and developers to build UXLINK One Chain to make UXLINK a Web3 super platform.

data.title: New Wallet Acquires Significant Amount Of ETH
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens has reported that a newly established wallet has spent approximately 49.51 million DAI to purchase 17,695 ETH at an average price of 2,798 USD.

data.title: Crypto market sectors continue to pull back, AI Agents sector fell 5%, ETH is relatively strong
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 24, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market continued to pull back, the AI ​​Agents sector fell 5%, and ETH was relatively strong. In the AI ​​Agents sector, ai16z (AI16Z), Fartcoin (FARTCOIN), and Turbo (TURBO) fell 5.10%, 5.64%, and 6.17% respectively in 24 hours, but AIXBT rose 4.06% against the trend. In addition, affected by multiple factors such as the convening of the Ethereum Ecological Conference, ETH rose 0.58% in 24 hours.
In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 0.38% in 24 hours, the Layer1 sector fell 2.10%, and within the sector, Sonic (S) rose 8.11% against the trend; the CeFi sector fell 2.38%, the Layer2 sector fell 2.39%, the DeFi sector fell 2.66%, and Raydium (RAY) fell 21.33% within the sector; the Meme sector fell 3.49%.

data.title: Bybit has accumulated 446,870 ETH through various channels
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, since the attack, Bybit has accumulated 446,870 ETH through loans, whale deposits and purchases, worth approximately US$1.23 billion.

data.title: Gate.io MemeBox Announces Strategic Partnership with BNB Chain
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, recently, Gate.io MemeBox officially announced a strategic cooperation with BNB Chain, aiming to promote the further development of the Meme coin market through a series of activities.
This cooperation marks Gate.io's diversified layout in the field of Meme coin trading. In the future, it will provide a series of new opportunities for BNB Chain's Meme coin projects, especially the top ten projects on the BNB Chain Meme Liquidity Support Program. They will have the opportunity to be listed in the Gate.io Innovation Zone, and provide multi-faceted exposure opportunities and resource support for the listed projects. This move will provide real growth for the project and help it occupy a place in the rapidly developing market.
It is reported that the Gate.io Innovation Zone is committed to integrating the advantages of spot trading and on-chain trading, and innovatively lowering the technical threshold for users to participate in on-chain projects. Users do not need to operate Web3 wallets or manage private keys. They can directly participate in hot projects on the chain with a Gate.io account, thereby accurately capturing early investment opportunities.
